targets.rawSql:
SELECT LoginName, ServerRole, PermissionName, PermissionState, CheckDateTime
FROM [Security].[ServerPermission]
WHERE 1=1
AND PermissionName = 'CONNECT SQL'
AND LoginName IN ($LoginName)
AND CheckDateTime <= $__timeTo()
AND CheckDateTime >= (SELECT MAX(CheckDateTime)
                      FROM Security.ServerPermission
                      WHERE CheckDateTime <= $__timeTo())

SELECT LoginName, PermissionName, PermissionState, CheckDateTime
FROM [Security].[ServerPermission]
WHERE 1=1
AND (PermissionName <> 'CONNECT SQL') 
AND LoginName IN ($LoginName)
AND CheckDateTime <= $__timeTo()
AND CheckDateTime >= (SELECT MAX(CheckDateTime)
                      FROM Security.ServerPermission
                      WHERE CheckDateTime <= $__timeTo())

SELECT [DatabaseName]
	,[UserType]
	,[DatabaseUserName]
	,[LoginName]
	,[DatabaseRole]
	,[CheckDateTime]
FROM [Security].[DatabasePermission]
WHERE (PermissionType <> 'CONNECT'
	OR PermissionType IS NULL)
AND DatabaseName IN ($DatabaseName)
AND LoginName IN ($LoginName)
AND DatabaseRole IN ($DatabaseRole)
AND CheckDateTime <= $__timeTo()
AND CheckDateTime >= (SELECT MAX(CheckDateTime)
                      FROM Security.DatabasePermission
                      WHERE CheckDateTime <= $__timeTo())

SELECT DatabaseName, UserType, LoginName, PermissionType, PermissionState, ObjectType, [Schema], ObjectName, ColumnName, CheckDateTime
FROM [Security].[DatabasePermission]
WHERE (PermissionType <> 'CONNECT'
	OR PermissionType IS NULL)
AND DatabaseName IN ($DatabaseName)
AND LoginName IN ($LoginName)
AND DatabaseRole IS NULL
AND CheckDateTime <= $__timeTo()
AND CheckDateTime >= (SELECT MAX(CheckDateTime)
                      FROM Security.DatabasePermission
                      WHERE CheckDateTime <= $__timeTo())

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT DatabaseName FROM Security.DatabasePermission WHERE CheckDateTime < $__timeTo() AND DatabaseName LIKE '%'+'$DatabasePattern'+'%'
list.name: DatabaseName
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT DatabaseName FROM Security.DatabasePermission WHERE CheckDateTime < $__timeTo() AND DatabaseName LIKE '%'+'$DatabasePattern'+'%'

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT LoginName FROM Security.ServerPermission WHERE CheckDateTime < $__timeTo() AND LoginName IS NOT NULL
list.name: LoginName
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT LoginName FROM Security.ServerPermission WHERE CheckDateTime < $__timeTo() AND LoginName IS NOT NULL

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT DatabaseRole FROM Security.DatabasePermission WHERE CheckDateTime < $__timeTo() AND DatabaseRole IS NOT NULL
list.name: DatabaseRole
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT DatabaseRole FROM Security.DatabasePermission WHERE CheckDateTime < $__timeTo() AND DatabaseRole IS NOT NULL
